content: The negation of the proposition “If 2 is prime, then 3 is odd” is

options.content: 2 is prime and 3 is not odd.
If 2 is not prime then 3 is not odd.
If 2 is not prime then 3 is odd.
2 is not prime and 3 is odd.

explanation:
Negation of $$\sim(p\to q)=p\wedge \sim q$$

So, negation of given statement is

If 2 is prime and 3 is not odd.
